message:
feat(cli): wa export and wa auth subcommands

Add two new top-level CLI subcommands:

wa export <kind>: JSONL data export with pane/time/limit filters,
  secret redaction by default (--no-redact to disable), --pretty
  and --output options. Supports segments, events, gaps, workflows,
  sessions, audit, and reservations.

wa auth <test|status|bootstrap>: browser authentication management.
  - test: run automated auth flow with headful debug mode option
  - status: check profile health for one or all services
  - bootstrap: interactive one-time login with configurable timeout
  Includes AuthTestOutcome enum (Success/NeedsHuman/Fail) for
  structured JSON output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
